steps.t: Treasure and Ninkoth uruks can be found throughout the ruins of Minas Elendúr and the Delotham under-cellars. Fúni Gem-cutter is waiting for you to re…
Fúni Gem-cutter is in Minas Elendúr. You have done what Fúni asked, and should return to him with the treasures you have gathered.
Fúsi Gem-cutter is at Echad Eregion. You have rescued his father and should bring the news to Fúsi.
Radanir is at Echad Eregion. The Rangers have been discussing something with Fúni Gem-cutter, now that he has been rescued, and Radanir may know more …
